base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of title_logo_jp — a ui from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. 'ドラキュラII 呪いの封印' (Dracula II - Noroi no Fuuin) JP title — red letters + KONAMI 1987. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'ドラキュラII 呪いの封印' (Dracula II - Noroi no Fuuin) JP title — red letters + KONAMI 1987
